workspace.title: Choose your workspace
workspace.invitePinned: {name} has been pinned to the top.
workspace.loadFailed: Failed to load organizations. Please refresh the page.
workspace.emptyDescription: You're not a member of any organization. Create one to get started.

createOrganization.pageDescription: Set up a new workspace, add a logo, and prepare the organization profile before inviting your team.
createOrganization.detailsDescription: Define the identity and core profile information for the new organization.
createOrganization.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only

validation.slugPattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens (e.g. my-org-2024)

logo.title: Organization avatar
logo.description: Add a logo now so your workspace card and navigation look ready from the start.
logo.hint: PNG, JPG or WebP. Max 2 MB. Click the avatar to upload or replace it.
logo.sizeError: Logo must be 2 MB or smaller.
logo.uploadError: Failed to upload organization logo. Please try again.

toasts.slugTaken: This URL slug is already taken. Please choose a different one.
toasts.subscriptionUnavailable: The selected subscription plan is not available.
toasts.createFailed: Failed to create organization. Please try again.

tenant.loadingDescription: Pulling the latest tenant signals and work queues.
tenant.errorDescription: The dashboard overview could not be loaded right now. Try again.
tenant.subtitleAdmin: Track approvals, portfolio health, and operational load across {organization}.
tenant.subtitleMember: Stay on top of tasks, tickets, and updates inside {organization}.

sections.attentionQueueDescription: The items most likely to block approvals and delivery.
sections.myWorkDescription: The tickets and actions that need follow-up from you.
sections.priorityActionsDescription: The shortest path to clear blockers and approvals.
sections.ticketFocusDescription: Recent ticket requests that still need review or follow-up.
sections.myTicketsDescription: Requests you created or need to keep moving.
sections.recentNotificationsDescription: Latest tenant activity routed to your notification feed.
sections.projectFocusDescription: A compact view of active projects and the task load around them.
sections.visualOverviewDescription: A quick read on volume, flow, and progress without opening multiple pages.
sections.focusNowDescription: What deserves attention first, plus the newest signals from the workspace.
sections.actionHubDescription: A tighter set of shortcuts and current delivery context.
sections.kpiBoardDescription: High-signal charts for the current operating period.
sections.periodSpotlightDescription: The few numbers that best describe this period.
sections.deliveryViewDescription: Project momentum and progress without extra feed noise.
sections.nextActionsDescription: Go straight to the most relevant workspace areas.
sections.projectsDescription: Progress and status for the most relevant projects right now.
sections.tasksDescription: Assigned work that is approaching due time or already needs attention.
sections.quickLinksDescription: Common places to continue the next action without extra navigation.
sections.operationsSnapshotDescription: A compact read on invitations, documents, and organization overtime load.
sections.personalSnapshotDescription: A compact read on your ticket pipeline and KPI period.

empty.actions: Nothing is waiting in the priority queue.
empty.projects: No projects are ready to show here yet.
empty.tasks: No tasks need attention right now.
empty.quickLinks: No quick links are available for this account.

quickLinkDescriptions.organizationManagement: Review people, roles, and organization settings.
quickLinkDescriptions.documents: Open the document workspace and review status.
quickLinkDescriptions.projects: Check project progress and assigned work.
quickLinkDescriptions.myKpi: Review your KPI targets and period coverage.

charts.performanceMixOrgDescription: Core organization capacity versus total scope this quarter.
charts.performanceMixMemberDescription: Your current workload, ticket load, and KPI scope this quarter.
charts.healthScoreOrgDescription: A blended score from completion, acceptance, and document readiness.
charts.healthScoreMemberDescription: A blended score from delivery momentum, workload pressure, and KPI coverage.
charts.queueCompositionOrgDescription: The queue split that currently demands management attention.
charts.queueCompositionMemberDescription: The work split that currently needs your attention.
charts.projectPortfolioDescription: Current spread of active, completed, and paused projects.
charts.ticketFlowDescription: Your ticket pipeline grouped by the states that need movement.
charts.budgetOverviewDescription: Estimated versus actual project budget aggregated from active portfolio data.
charts.orgPulseDescription: Core operational counts for the current period.
charts.personalWorkloadDescription: Your current load across tasks, due dates, and active projects.
charts.actionPressureDescription: Operational queue volume that still needs intervention.
charts.workloadBreakdownDescription: How much assigned work is open, due soon, and overdue.
charts.projectProgressDescription: Top projects by current progress percentage.
